351.name: Mom40+W%R+Top3 (cc3_352.py)
351.description: A hybrid momentum rotator that combines three bullish signals on QQQ to determine how aggressively to allocate between leveraged tech and large-cap equities. The strategy scores three conditions — a long-term price median gate, a 40-day price momentum check, and a Williams %R reading — and shifts the portfolio along a risk ladder from TQQQ to top-3 market-cap stocks to a cash-equivalent ETF as the score falls. All three signals must align to go fully leveraged; no signals result in a defensive split.
351.overfit_notes: Three tuned components: 200-bar median as trend gate (non-SMA), 40-day momentum lookback, Williams %R threshold at -50 (midline). Portfolio allocation ladder uses non-rounded 50/50 split for score=2 state. Lookback of 40 days is a non-standard momentum period.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > 100th percentile of last 200 daily closes (rolling median)

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: QQQ 40-day price momentum positive (close[-1] > close[-41])

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Score 3 (all signals) → 100% TQQQ; Score 2 → 50% TQQQ + 50% top-3 large-caps; Score 1 → 100% top-3 large-caps; Score 0 → 50% top-3 large-caps + 50% BIL

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: Signal score change triggers immediate rebalance

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ + W%R(14). Execution: TQQQ / top-3 market-cap stocks / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Top 3 stocks by market cap from top 100 by dollar volume (daily coarse+fine universe)

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only
